description: The Porsche 918 Spyder, produced from 2013 to 2015, was Porsche's hybrid hypercar. Its naturally aspirated 4.6-litre V8 combined with two electric motors produced 875 bhp, enabling a Nurburgring lap time of 6:57. Just 918 units were built. The Weissach Package, saving 41 kg, is the most desirable specification.
